channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: People Sharing Personal Stories to Help Train AI Conversation Skills
item.description: Late last year, Gina engaged in a virtual counselling session with a pastor, sharing deeply personal experiences, including breakups, childhood trauma, and her father's struggles after serving in the ...

item.title: Lebogang Maile changes governance rules ahead of Gauteng executive reshuffle
item.description: As the Gauteng provincial government underwent an executive reshuffle, outgoing Finance and Economic Development MEC Lebogang Maile took steps to limit the influence of his successors in appointing se...

item.title: Sindh government grants two-day holiday to Christian employees for Easter celebrations
item.description: The Sindh government has officially announced a two-day holiday for Christian employees working in provincial government departments on the occasion of Easter. The holidays will be observed on April 5...

item.title: Ongoing Iran-Israel Conflict: Strikes in Tehran, Bushehr, and Regional Escalations
item.description: The ongoing conflict between Iran and Israel has escalated significantly, with multiple military actions reported across West Asia. U.S. President Donald Trump claimed that a major strike in Tehran el...

item.title: Australia's fuel supply stable, Energy Minister urges sensible use over Easter
item.description: Energy Minister Chris Bowen has assured Australians that the nation's fuel supply remains strong, with 50 shipments currently on their way to service stations across the country. Bowen confirmed that ...

item.title: Wike Explains Comment About TV Host Was Figurative, Not Threat
item.description: Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike, don clear one statement wey people talk say e threaten Channels TV host, Seun Okinbaloye. Wike talk say na figurative talk e dey use express him...

item.title: Storm Dave expected to bring heavy snow and strong winds across northern UK this Easter
item.description: Storm Dave is set to bring severe weather to northern parts of the United Kingdom over the Easter weekend. The Met Office has issued an amber warning for coastal areas, where wind gusts could reach up...

item.title: US President issues ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued a stern 48-hour ultimatum to Iran, demanding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, amid escalating military tensions in the region. The conflict, now in its sixth...

item.title: Study Links High Intake of Ultra-Processed Foods to Increased Cardiovascular Risk
item.description: A recent study published in JACC: Advances investigated the effects of ultra-processed foods on heart health, focusing on 6,814 U.S. adults aged 45 to 84 who initially had no cardiovascular disease. P...

item.title: Trump issues urgent ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz amid military tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump issued a stern warning to Iran, stating that 'hell will reign down' within 48 hours unless Tehran opens the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz and agrees to a peace deal. The ...

item.title: Celebrating 65 Years of Canberra’s Ethos Sculpture
item.description: On December 15, Canberra will mark the 65th anniversary of the unveiling of Ethos, the monumental sculpture by Tom Bass located in Civic Square. As the city’s first public sculpture, it was mainly fun...

item.title: Barrenjoey to pay $45m dividend ahead of merger with Magellan Financial
item.description: Barrenjoey Capital Partners has announced plans to pay up to $45 million in dividends to its shareholders, a move that significantly exceeds the firm's historical payouts. This announcement comes ahea...

item.title: Astronaut Victor Glover briefly shown cleaning himself on live feed during Artemis II mission
item.description: During the Artemis II mission en route to the Moon, NASA inadvertently broadcast footage of astronaut Victor Glover using a hygiene towel after exercising aboard the Orion spacecraft. The 49-year-old ...

item.title: TikTok Creators Explore and Review London’s Upmarket Bakeries
item.description: A recent wave of TikTok videos has turned the spotlight onto London’s so-called 'gentrified' bakeries, with content creators reviewing artisan cafes and independent bakeries they wouldn’t normally vis...

item.title: Australians favour larger vehicles despite record fuel costs
item.description: Australians are continuing to buy larger cars and SUVs even amid record fuel prices, reflecting a mismatch between environmental concerns and consumer behaviour. Despite warnings from experts and grow...

item.title: Challenges Persist in Kenya’s Education System Despite Grade 10 Transition
item.description: Kenya has celebrated the first cohort of Grade 10 students transitioning under the Competency-Based Education (CBE) system, with the Ministry of Education citing a 99 per cent transition rate. However...

item.title: Derek Chisora Faces Deontay Wilder in London with Potential Career Implications
item.description: Tonight, London’s O2 Arena hosts a high-stakes heavyweight bout between Derek Chisora and Deontay Wilder. For Chisora, aged 42, this fight is billed as his final contest, marking the culmination of a ...

item.title: Rare case of a hermaphrodite goat discovered in Geita
item.description: For Geita, Ms Catherine Kachwele, who is a traditional healer, received a goat from a client as partial payment for services after he could not pay in cash. When she brought it home, neighbours and ch...

item.title: Bulls fall just short against Glasgow Warriors in Champions Cup thriller
item.description: The Bulls came close to causing an upset in Glasgow but were narrowly beaten 25-21 by the Warriors in a thrilling Champions Cup clash. The game started with the Bulls dominating the first ten minutes,...

item.title: Lessons from Sydney 2000 to Guide Brisbane 2032 Olympic Preparations
item.description: David Atkins, a key figure behind the Sydney 2000 Olympic ceremonies, has offered advice for Brisbane’s 2032 Olympic plans, emphasising the importance of maintaining ambition during the early stages o...
